title: Feedback
description: Video feedback — the runaway echo you get pointing a camera at its own screen. Each frame is composited over a zoomed, rotated, drifting and fading copy of the previous one, so the image tunnels inward, spirals, and trails into infinite echoes. Zoom, rotation, drift, decay, hue-cycling and a kaleidoscopic mirror are live and mappable — works on a camera, a dropped photo/video, the demo, or the layers below.
